case_title: ROSA L. ROBINSON VS. STEVEN'S SHELL AUTO SERVICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ROBINSON, ROSA L. AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN'S SHELL AUTO SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT ROSA L. ROBINSON. DEFENDANT STEVE'S SHELL AUTO SERVICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN CHENG. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT STEVEN'S SHELL AUTO SERVICE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, ROSA L. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STEVEN'S SHELL AUTO SERVICE PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE THAT DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT OR NEGLIGENCE CAUSED HER HARM. DEFENDANT DID NOT RETAIN THE PAYMENT AND THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT DAMAGED THE CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR 10949 N. MATHER BLVD RANCHO CORDOVO CA95670
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED DEC-04-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN'S SHELL AUTO SERVICE
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, ROSA L. ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, ROSA L. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2019 - JUDGMENT.
DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF APRIL 2, 2019.
